You create a retention label policy named Contoso_Policy. After a couple of days, you discover the status is Off (Error) with 'It's taking longer than expected to deploy the policy'. You need to reinitiate the policy. How should you complete the command?

You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that contains a Microsoft SharePoint Online site named Site1 and users: User1 (Members group), User2 (Owners group), Admin1 (SharePoint Administrator). You have a DLP policy named DLP1 that restricts access. User1 uploads a file named File1 to Site1. File1 does NOT match any DLP1 rules. User2 updates File1 to contain data that matches the DLP1 rules. Evaluate if the following are true: 1. User1 can access File1 on Site 1. 2. User2 can access File1 on Site 1. 3. Admin1 can access File1 on Site1.
questions.explanation: User1 can access File1 on Site 1 (No). User2 can access File1 on Site 1 (Yes). Admin1 can access File1 on Site1 (Yes).

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 subscription that has a retention label named Retention1. The subscription contains File1 (Exchange Online), File2 (SharePoint Online, 5 SWIFT codes), and File3 (OneDrive, 2 Shared access signatures). You create an auto-labeling policy named Policy1 that will automatically apply Retention1. Evaluate if the following are true: 1. Retention is applied to File1. 2. Retention is applied to File2. 3. Retention is applied to File3.
questions.explanation: Retention is applied to File1 (No). Retention is applied to File2 (Yes). Retention is applied to File3 (No).

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that contains a data loss prevention (DLP) policy named DLP1. DLP1 contains rules: Rule1 (Priority 0, Tip 1, Stop processing Enabled), Rule2 (Priority 1, Tip 2, Stop processing Enabled), Rule3 (Priority 2, Tip 3, Stop processing Disabled), Rule4 (Priority 3, Tip 4, Stop processing Enabled). You need to ensure that when a document matches all the rules, users will see Tip 2. What should you change?
options: A. the priority setting of Rule2 to 0
B. the priority setting of Rule2 to 2
C. the priority setting of Rule3 and Rule4 to 0
D. the If there's a match for this rule, stop processing additional DLP policies and rules setting for Rule3 to Enabled

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that contains a user named User1. You deploy Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AD (DSPM for AD). You need to ensure that User1 can verify the auditing status of the subscription. The solution must follow the principle of least privilege. To which role group should you add User1?
options: D. View-Only Organization Management for Microsoft Exchange Online

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription. You plan to implement Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management. You obtain a file named File1.csv that contains employee resignation data. You need to implement the HR data connector and upload File1.csv by using the connector. Which three actions should you perform in sequence?
options: A. 1. From the Microsoft Entra admin center, create an app registration. 2. From the Microsoft Purview portal, add the data connector. 3. Run a sample script to upload File1.csv.
B. 1. Configure the Insider Risk Management settings. 2. Implement Microsoft Entra Connect sync. 3. From the Microsoft Purview portal, add the data connector.
C. 1. From the Microsoft Purview portal, add the data connector. 2. Run a sample script to upload File1.csv. 3. Configure the Insider Risk Management settings.

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that uses Microsoft Purview. You need to deploy a compliance solution that will detect the accidental oversharing of information outside of an organization. The solution must minimize administrative effort. What should you use?
options: A. Policy template: Data leaks / Policy template prerequisite: A data loss prevention (DLP) policy
B. Policy template: Risky browser usage / Policy template prerequisite: A retention policy
C. Policy template: Security policy violations / Policy template prerequisite: An alert policy

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription. You are implementing insider risk management. You need to maximize the amount of historical data that is collected when an event is triggered. What is the maximum number of days that historical data can be collected?

You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that contains 500 Windows devices. You plan to deploy Microsoft Purview Data Security Posture Management for AI (DSPM for AI). You need to ensure that you can monitor user activities on third-party generative AI websites. Which two prerequisites should you complete for DSPM for AI? Each correct answer presents part of the solution.
options: A. Install the Microsoft Purview extension on the devices.
B. Create a data leaks policy.
C. Onboard the devices to Microsoft Purview.
D. Create a communication compliance policy.
E. Create an Endpoint data loss prevention (Endpoint DLP) policy.
F. Enroll the devices in Microsoft Intune.

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that uses retention label policies. You need to identify all the changes made to retention labels during the last 30 days. What should you use in the Microsoft Purview portal?

You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that uses Microsoft Purview insider risk management and contains three users named User1, User2, and User3. User1 performs at least one data exfiltration activity that results in a high severity risk score. User2 performs at least three risky user activities within seven days, that each results in a high severity risk score. User3 performs at least two data exfiltration activities within seven days, that each results in a high severity risk score. Which insider risk level is assigned to each user?
options: A. User1: Minor risk level, User2: Elevated risk level, User3: Moderate risk level
B. User1: Moderate risk level, User2: Minor risk level, User3: Elevated risk level
C. User1: Elevated risk level, User2: Moderate risk level, User3: Minor risk level

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that contains the users: User1 (Global Administrator), User2 (Insider Risk Management Analysts), User3 (Insider Risk Management Investigators). The subscription contains Group1 (Security) and Group2 (Microsoft 365). You plan to create a priority user group named Priority1. Which users and groups can be added to Priority1? Which users can be enabled to view alerts that involve the members of Priority1?
options: A. Can be added to Priority1: User1, User2, User3, Group1, and Group2 / Can be enabled to view alerts that involve the members of Priority1: User2 and User3 only
B. Can be added to Priority1: User1 only / Can be enabled to view alerts that involve the members of Priority1: User1 only
C. Can be added to Priority1: User1, User2, and User3 only / Can be enabled to view alerts that involve the members of Priority1: User1, User2, and User3

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 subscription. You have a Microsoft SharePoint Online site named Site1 with files: File1 (DOCX, Created Dec 1, 2023), File2 (XLSX, Created Feb 5, 2024), File3 (PNG, Created May 4, 2023). From the Microsoft Purview compliance portal, for Site1 you create a content search named Search1 that has the date in the YYYY-MM-DD format as a condition. Evaluate if the following are true (based on an exhibit showing a search with specific date constraints that exclude these dates): 1. File1 is included in the Search results. 2. File2 is included in the Search results. 3. File3 is included in the Search results.
questions.explanation: File1 is included in the Search results (No). File2 is included in the Search results (No). File3 is included in the Search results (No).

questions.text: You have a Microsoft 365 E5 subscription that contains a Microsoft SharePoint Online site named Site1. Site1 contains three files named File1, File2, and File3. You create DLP policies: DLP1 (Site1, Rule 11, Rule 12, Rule 13), DLP2 (Site1, Rule21, Rule22). The DLP rule matches for each file are: File1 (Rule 11, Rule 12), File2 (Rule21, Rule22), File3 (Rule 11, Rule22). How many DLP policy matches events will be added to Activity explorer, and how many policy matches will be added to the DLP incidents report?

You implement Microsoft 365 Endpoint data loss prevention (Endpoint DLP). You have computers that run Windows 11 and have Microsoft 365 Apps installed. The computers are joined to a Microsoft Entra tenant. You need to ensure that Endpoint DLP policies can protect content on the computers. Solution: You onboard the computers to Microsoft Defender for Endpoint. Does this meet the goal?

You are implementing Microsoft Purview Information Protection for a financial institution. Which component should you use to automatically discover and classify credit card numbers across all SharePoint Online sites?
questions.explanation: Auto-labeling policies for sensitivity labels allow you to automatically classify data at rest in SharePoint Online based on sensitive information types like credit card numbers.
questions.translation_es: Está implementando Microsoft Purview Information Protection para una institución financiera. ¿Qué componente debe usar para detectar y clasificar automáticamente los números de tarjetas de crédito en todos los sitios de SharePoint Online?
